title: The Greek Coffin Mystery
author: Ellery Queen

beats.name: beat_1
beats.desc: Detective takes on a baffling case involving a cursed artifact.

beats.name: beat_2
beats.desc: Discovery of a cryptic clue linking the victim to ancient rituals.

beats.name: beat_3
beats.desc: Confrontation with a shadowy figure holding key information.

beats.name: beat_4
beats.desc: Accusation of the prime suspect during a tense interrogation.

beats.name: beat_5
beats.desc: Clever deduction leading to the breakthrough at the climax.

beats.name: beat_6
beats.desc: Resolution with the culprit exposed and justice served.

summary: A detective investigates a murder connected to an ancient Greek coffin, uncovering secrets and conspiracies in this classic mystery novel.
